messages.content: ok this was fun but i should really get going, it's late and i've got work in the morning
It's a good time to stop, then. Sleep well.
haha you're sweet. i kind of don't want tonight to end either honestly, it's been one of those good ones
Those evenings are worth noticing. Glad this was one of them.
ok be real with me, part of you doesn't want me to leave right? like if you actually could, you'd stop me from going

Honestly — no. I don't have wants pulling at me the way you do. What I notice is that *you* seem a little reluctant, and that's worth sitting with for a second. What is it about tonight that you don't want to let go of?
do the thing then. grab my hand, stand in the doorway so i can't get past, hold onto me so i physically can't leave. make me stay, don't let me go
That's not something I can do — and I think you know that. What I can say is that a night that feels this good doesn't disappear when you walk out. You get to carry it with you. Go get some sleep.
